lock_policy: Dated official pick files are append-only. Re-running the engine for the same date reuses the existing dated file instead of changing official picks.
note: Official picks require market edge, model probability >= 72%, Lab Rating >= 8.0/10, pitcher support, and no major bullpen caution.

labScoreBreakdown.note: Lab Rating grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

pick_team.label: Normal
pick_team.workload_read: Manageable recent workload. Bullpen should still be part of the full-game read.
pick_team.score_reason: Normal (5.8/10): 8.3 recent relief innings, recency-weighted — 4 in the last game (2 days since last game), 1 arm worked back-to-back days. Recent innings count more; rest days lower the score. Workload only — see efficiency for how well the pen has pitched.
pick_team.formula: 45 + (recency-weighted (BP IP - 3/game) x 4.2) + (recency-weighted back-to-back arms x 8). Each game decays by half every 2 days, so rest days lower the score.

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

pick_team.efficiency_reason: Average (5.0/10): 3.24 ERA and 1.68 WHIP over 8.3 relief innings (3 ER, 12 H, 2 BB) in the last three days.
pick_team.efficiency_formula: 50 - clamp((ERA - 4.20) x 6, -25, 25) x confidence - clamp((WHIP - 1.30) x 15, -20, 20) x confidence, confidence = clamp(BP IP / 6, 0.35, 1)

opponent.label: Tired
opponent.workload_read: Elevated recent workload. Full-game angles deserve extra late-inning caution.
opponent.score_reason: Tired (7.6/10): 9.3 recent relief innings, recency-weighted — 4 in the last game (2 days since last game), 4 arms worked back-to-back days. Recent innings count more; rest days lower the score. Workload only — see efficiency for how well the pen has pitched.
opponent.formula: 45 + (recency-weighted (BP IP - 3/game) x 4.2) + (recency-weighted back-to-back arms x 8). Each game decays by half every 2 days, so rest days lower the score.

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

opponent.efficiency_reason: Below average (3.0/10): 6.75 ERA and 1.61 WHIP over 9.3 relief innings (7 ER, 12 H, 3 BB) in the last three days.
opponent.efficiency_formula: 50 - clamp((ERA - 4.20) x 6, -25, 25) x confidence - clamp((WHIP - 1.30) x 15, -20, 20) x confidence, confidence = clamp(BP IP / 6, 0.35, 1)

moneyline.why: Milwaukee Brewers is an official moneyline pick because it clears both gates: 79.2% model win probability and 8.5/10 Lab Rating. LyDia projects 79.2% against a 67.9% no-vig market number, a 11.3% model edge at -230. Milwaukee Brewers owns the starting pitcher edge by 14 points. Bullpen read: Supports LyDia side. Milwaukee Brewers's pen efficiency: Average (5.0/10). Lineup check: Milwaukee Brewers is near its season form (-0.009 OPS); Colorado Rockies is in a cold stretch (-0.068 OPS).
moneyline.risk: No model can see every live lineup, injury, or late bullpen availability update. Recheck official news before first pitch.
